scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c green,blue "pnpm --filter vite-demo dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && pnpm build:main && ELECTRON_DEV=1 electron ."
scripts.stage:renderer: rm -rf staging/renderer && mkdir -p staging && cp -r ../vite-demo/dist staging/renderer && rm -rf staging/renderer/disks
scripts.package: pnpm build && pnpm stage:renderer && mkdir -p $HOME/.cache/electron-packager-tmp && TMPDIR=$HOME/.cache/electron-packager-tmp electron-packager . anyfs-demo --platform=linux --arch=x64 --out=out --overwrite --prune=false --extra-resource=staging/renderer --ignore='^/(staging|out|node_modules|src|tsup\.config\.ts|tsconfig\.json|README\.md|\.gitignore)($|/)'
scripts.package:mac: pnpm build && pnpm stage:renderer && mkdir -p $HOME/.cache/electron-packager-tmp && TMPDIR=$HOME/.cache/electron-packager-tmp electron-packager . anyfs-demo --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=out --overwrite --prune=false --extra-resource=staging/renderer --ignore='^/(staging|out|node_modules|src|tsup\.config\.ts|tsconfig\.json|README\.md|\.gitignore)($|/)'
